LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.- MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED BECAUSE OF TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT EXIST. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE FIRST(FAILURE TO ENGAGE IN THE INTERACTIVE PROCESS), SECOND (FAILURE TO ACCOMODATE) AND THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION (DISABILITY HARASSMENT) IS GRANTED, WHERE THE FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED; DENIED IT AS TO THE FOURTH (DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION), FIFTH (DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION) AND SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION (RETALIATION). PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =(302/HEK)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JEFFREY JUAREZ' MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM ORDER GRANTING SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT HAS THE ABILITY TO DECIDE A CASE ON THE MERITS. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Michael Edward Adams, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Erin Euka, Deputy City Attorney, appearing for the Defendant CCSF.

RULING - PLAINTIFF JEFFREY JUAREZ' Motion For Relief From Order Granting Summary Judgment is Granted. The court has the ability to decide a case on the merits. Parties to meet and confer as to form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion For Summary Judgment And/Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Michael Edward Adams, tEL. nO. 1-650-599-9463 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Erin Euka, Tel. No. 1-415-554-4229, Deputy City Attorney, appearing for the Defendant CCSF.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendant City And County Of San Francisco's Motion For Summary Judgment And/Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.- Motion for summary judgment is Denied because of triable issues of material fact exist. Summary adjudication as to the first(Failure to engage in the interactive Process), second (Failure to accomodate) and third cause of action (Disability Harassment) is Granted, where the first and third causes of action is granted as unopposed; Denied it as to the fourth (Disability Discrimination), fifth (Disability Discrimination) and sixth cause of action (Retaliation). Parties to meet and confer as to form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion For Relief From Order Granting Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Continued To Aug-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Adams, Esq. 650-599-9463 for Plaintiff JEFFREY JUAREZ.
Erin Kuka, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JEFFREY JUAREZ's Motion For Relief From Order Granting Summary Judgment.

Continued to August 1, 2018 at 9:30 am. Plaintiff to submit Opposition papers composed of two aspects (as stated on the record) by July 11, 2018. Defendant's response is due by July 25, 2018. The City's prior motion from February 28, 2018 will also be added to the Calendar for August 1, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.
